name: Linear
summary: momentum not sprints, rotating project leads, concise specs, weekly Quality Wednesdays ritual

sources.note: principles and practices: momentum not sprints, n-week cycles, single owners, cross-functional teams, project specs
engineer-led rotating project leads, 1-2 page specs, weekly project updates, milestones, release readiness
weekly ritual: every engineer ships one small quality fix, presented at Wednesday standup
candidate projects as the planning unit; triage feeds continuous planning, not periodic blank-page sessions
small remote team, ship early, avoid side quests, think in principles not playbooks
verified org; linear/linear SDK+plugins repo, linear-release CLI, github-webhook-proxy
